heading: Continuation of certain education programs
label: 40908 Continuation of certain education programs
text: From amounts appropriated to the Administration for education programs, the Administrator shall ensure the continuation of the Space Grant Program, the Experimental Program to Stimulate Competitive Research, and, consistent with the results of the review under section 614 of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration Authorization Act of 2005 (, ), the Administration Explorer School program, to motivate and develop the next generation of explorers.Public Law 109–155119 Stat. 2933
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)40908.42 U.S.C. 16797, , .Pub. L. 109–155, title VI, § 618119 Stat. 2934Dec. 30, 2005

References in TextSection 614 of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration Authorization Act of 2005, referred to in text, was classified to former , The Public Health and Welfare, and was omitted from the Code following the enactment of this title by .section 16793 of Title 42Pub. L. 111–314
